name: memforks
description: Blockchain-anchored, branch-aware memory for Codex. MemForks recalls prior decisions and learned facts at session start, auto-commits memory after each turn, and syncs with your Git branch.

interface.longDescription: MemForks gives Codex a tamper-proof, branch-synced memory store anchored on Sui. It recalls relevant context from the current Git branch at session start, auto-commits learned facts after each turn, and proposes conflict-free merges via an on-chain resolver. Every memory write is a verifiable transaction — not a flat file.
defaultPrompt: Recall any relevant MemForks context for this branch
What does MemForks remember about this project?
